Hero.description: PlanIt helps you build multi-week class schedules, configure breaks and lesson details, work locally, or synchronize data after signing in.

Features.title: Only what PlanIt already does
Features.description: Features confirmed by the current code: local schedules, cloud sync, explicit conflict control, and a public repository.

speed.title: Local operation
speed.description: Guest mode needs no account: the schedule is stored on the device and can be opened without signing in.

security.title: On-device data
security.description: PlanIt loads its local copy first. Signed-in users retain that copy while working without a network connection.

sync.title: Cloud synchronization
sync.description: After email, Google, or Apple sign-in, schedules synchronize through Firebase across connected devices.

analytics.title: Public source code
analytics.description: The application source is available to inspect in a public GitHub repository.

AppShowcase.title: Details that are actually in the app

customization.title: Flexible lessons
customization.description: Subjects support colors, gradients, and icons; lessons support type, building, room, teachers, links, and individual times.

sync.title: Explicit conflict resolution
sync.description: When the same schedule changes locally and in the cloud, PlanIt shows both versions and asks which one to keep.

sharing.title: Temporary share codes
sharing.description: A signed-in user can create a code lasting 1, 3, 7, or 30 days, and the recipient can preview and import a schedule copy.

widgets.title: Android widget
widgets.description: The Android widget shows lessons and breaks and lets you move through adjacent schedule days.

Platforms.title: A clear status for every version

ios.title: iOS
ios.description: The project includes iOS configuration, but a public iOS build and an iOS widget have not been released.

android.title: Android
android.description: The primary native build, with guest mode, synchronization, and a home-screen widget.

web.title: Web App
web.description: The current PlanIt web build runs in a browser and uses the same schedule and synchronization model.

HowItWorks.title: From a blank screen to a complete schedule

step1.title: Configure the structure
step1.description: Set a name, cycle length, starting date, first lesson time, lesson duration, and break lengths.

step2.title: Add lessons
step2.description: Choose subjects and add the details you need: type, location, teachers, links, appearance, and time.

step3.title: Store or synchronize
step3.description: Work locally as a guest, or sign in to synchronize schedules and create temporary share codes.

CTA.title: Build your schedule in PlanIt
CTA.description: Open the current web version without installing anything. Guest mode does not require an account.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.section1Content: In guest mode, PlanIt stores the schedule locally on the device. After sign-in, schedules synchronize with Firebase and also retain a local copy.
Privacy.section2Content: PlanIt supports email and password, Google Sign-In, and Apple Sign-In on compatible platforms. Authentication data is handled by Firebase Authentication.
Privacy.section3Content: Native builds include Firebase Analytics, Firebase Crashlytics, and Google Mobile Ads. The full policy describes device data, advertising identifiers, third-party services, retention, and user rights.
Privacy.officialDocument: Open the application's full privacy policy

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.section1Content: PlanIt is provided as is, without warranties of any kind. The service or individual features may be changed or discontinued.
Terms.section2Content: Users are responsible for the legality of information they add to schedules, including teacher contacts, links, and notes. Important data should also be backed up independently.
Terms.section3Content: The PlanIt source is available to inspect in a public GitHub repository. A separate license file is not currently published in that repository.
Terms.officialDocument: Open the application's full terms of service

home.title: PlanIt | Class Schedule
home.description: PlanIt is a local and synchronized class schedule with multi-week cycles, breaks, lesson details, sharing, and an Android widget.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: How PlanIt stores local schedules, synchronizes data through Firebase, and handles authentication.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: PlanIt usage terms and accurate information about the application's public source code.

delete.title: Account Deletion
delete.description: How to request deletion of a PlanIt account and the data associated with it.
